item.title: Senate unveils bipartisan supplemental transportation budget prioritizing preservation and maintenance, job creation - Sen. Marko Liias
item.description: News article "Senate unveils bipartisan supplemental transportation budget prioritizing preservation and maintenance, job creation - Sen. Marko Liias" from Senate Democrats.

item.title: State Senate Signs Onto Billions of New Debt for Highway Upkeep » The Urbanist
item.description: News article "State Senate Signs Onto Billions of New Debt for Highway Upkeep » The Urbanist" from The Urbanist.

item.title: 👍Robin Koskey - Puget Sound Regional Council
item.description: Robin Koskey signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Puget Sound Regional Council.

item.title: 👍Jerry VanderWood - Associated General Contractors (AGC)
item.description: Jerry VanderWood signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Associated General Contractors (AGC).

item.title: 👍Mike Ennis - Washington Asphalt Pavement Association (WAPA)
item.description: Mike Ennis signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Asphalt Pavement Association (WAPA).

item.title: 👍💵Neil Strege - Washington Roundtable
item.description: Neil Strege signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Roundtable. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍💵Billy Wallace - Washington & Northern Idaho District Council of Laborers
item.description: Billy Wallace signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington & Northern Idaho District Council of Laborers. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 49; nays, 0; absent, 0; excused, 0.
